hero.title: INVISIBLE VPN. POWERED BY VLESS-REALITY
hero.subtitle: Bypass DPI blocking of any complexity. Masquerade traffic as standard HTTPS. Up to 10 Gbps speeds without encapsulation loss.

features.sectionSubtitle: Six layers of defense engineered for the modern cyber-citizen

stealth.title: Stealth Mode (Reality)
stealth.desc: Traffic is indistinguishable from visiting Google/Microsoft/Apple. No VPN fingerprinting.

backbone.title: Backbone Performance
backbone.desc: Native 10 Gbit/s uplinks in Tier-3 data centers. Optimized for 4K/8K streaming and low-ping gaming.

ram.title: RAM-Only Infrastructure
ram.desc: No disks, no logs, no persistence. Infrastructure is wiped on every restart.

routing.title: Intelligent Routing
routing.desc: Global mesh of 100+ nodes with automated latency-based selection.

multiplatform.title: Native Multi-Platform
multiplatform.desc: One subscription for Telegram Bot, iOS, Android, Windows, macOS, and Linux.

protocols.title: Advanced Protocols
protocols.desc: Full support for VLESS, Trojan, and Shadowsocks-2022. Native XHTTP support to bypass the strictest corporate and state firewalls—your traffic looks indistinguishable from standard HTTP requests to trusted resources.

how_it_works.title: How Reality Works
how_it_works.desc: Your ISP sees a request to microsoft.com or google.com. They don't see an encrypted tunnel. They see a normal user browsing the web. Access granted. Includes intelligent transport selection—automatically failing over to XHTTP if non-standard protocols are blocked.

quick_start.title: 30-Second Path
quick_start.step3: Import config to any app and stay free
quick_start.terminalStatus: > Tunnel Established. DPI bypassed. Securing transport...
